title: AP2 Revision
description: Practise all the key Scratch skills from this year: animation, arrow key controls, collision detection, scoring, chasing, and putting it all together.

steps.title: Revision Overview
steps.content:
Revision: what you need to know

This revision lesson covers the key Scratch skills you have practised throughout the year. You will build each skill in TurboWarp, then combine them in a final mini-game.

#SkillKey blocks
1Animate a sprite (change costume in a loop)forever → next costume → wait
2Control a sprite with arrow keysforever → if key pressed → change x/y by
3Collision detection and random positionif touching [sprite]? → go to x: (random) y: (random)
4Score increase and decreasechange [score v] by (1) / change [score v] by (-1)
5Chase the playerforever → point towards [sprite v] → move steps
6Sprite says something for X secondssay [text v] for (X) seconds

steps.title: Skill 1: Animating a Sprite
steps.content:
Skill 1: Animating a sprite

To animate a sprite, use next costume inside a forever loop. The sprite must have at least two costumes.

Animation script

when green flag clicked
forever
  next costume
  wait (0.2) seconds
end

To add a second costume: select the sprite → Costumes tab → hover over the costume button → Choose a Costume.

Build this animation now and press Check:
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,btn=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),isF=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');btn.textContent=isF?'✕':'⛶';btn.title=isF?'Exit full screen (Esc)':'Full screen';if(isF){window._y7sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._y7sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._y7r)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._y7r);window._y7r=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',window._y7r);if(window._y7k)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);window._y7k=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){var frame=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),r=document.getElementById('y7-check-result');try{var vm=frame.contentWindow.vm;if(!vm){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Editor still loading — try again in a moment.';return;}var tg=vm.runtime.targets,hC=false,hF=false;for(var t=0;t<tg.length;t++){var bl=tg[t].blocks._blocks;for(var id in bl){var b=bl[id];if(b.opcode==='looks_nextcostume'||b.opcode==='looks_switchcostumeto')hC=true;if(b.opcode==='control_forever')hF=true;}}if(hC&&hF){r.style.color='#86efac';r.textContent='✓ Animation detected — next costume in a forever loop!';__markStepComplete();}else{var miss=[];if(!hC)miss.push('next costume block');if(!hF)miss.push('forever loop');r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Missing: '+miss.join(', ')+'.';};}catch(e){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Cannot check: '+e.message;}};}())

steps.title: Skill 2: Arrow Key Controls
steps.content:
Skill 2: Arrow key controls

Four-directional movement uses a forever loop with four if key pressed checks inside.

Four-directional movement script

when green flag clicked
forever
  if <key [right arrow v] pressed?> then
    change x by (5)
  end
  if <key [left arrow v] pressed?> then
    change x by (-5)
  end
  if <key [up arrow v] pressed?> then
    change y by (5)
  end
  if <key [down arrow v] pressed?> then
    change y by (-5)
  end
end

Build four-directional controls and check:
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,btn=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),isF=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');btn.textContent=isF?'✕':'⛶';btn.title=isF?'Exit full screen (Esc)':'Full screen';if(isF){window._y7sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._y7sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._y7r)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._y7r);window._y7r=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',window._y7r);if(window._y7k)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);window._y7k=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){var frame=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),r=document.getElementById('y7-check-result');try{var vm=frame.contentWindow.vm;if(!vm){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Editor still loading — try again in a moment.';return;}var tg=vm.runtime.targets,keys=[];for(var t=0;t<tg.length;t++){var bl=tg[t].blocks._blocks;for(var id in bl){var b=bl[id];if(b.opcode==='sensing_keypressed'&&b.fields&&b.fields.KEY_OPTION)keys.push(b.fields.KEY_OPTION[0]);}}var hR=keys.indexOf('right arrow')!==-1,hL=keys.indexOf('left arrow')!==-1,hU=keys.indexOf('up arrow')!==-1,hD=keys.indexOf('down arrow')!==-1;if(hR&&hL&&hU&&hD){r.style.color='#86efac';r.textContent='✓ All four directional controls detected!';__markStepComplete();}else{var miss=[];if(!hR)miss.push('right');if(!hL)miss.push('left');if(!hU)miss.push('up');if(!hD)miss.push('down');r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Missing arrow key(s): '+miss.join(', ')+'.';};}catch(e){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Cannot check: '+e.message;}};}())

steps.title: Skill 3: Collision & Random Position
steps.content:
Skill 3: Collision detection and random positioning

When the player touches a collectible, it jumps to a random position and the score goes up.

Collectible sprite script

when green flag clicked
set [Score v] to (0)
forever
  if <touching [Player v]?> then
    go to x: (pick random (-200) to (200)) y: (pick random (-150) to (150))
    change [Score v] by (1)
  end
end

Build this on a second sprite. Move a first sprite onto it to test:
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,btn=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),isF=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');btn.textContent=isF?'✕':'⛶';btn.title=isF?'Exit full screen (Esc)':'Full screen';if(isF){window._y7sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._y7sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._y7r)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._y7r);window._y7r=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',window._y7r);if(window._y7k)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);window._y7k=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){var frame=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),r=document.getElementById('y7-check-result');try{var vm=frame.contentWindow.vm;if(!vm){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Editor still loading — try again in a moment.';return;}var tg=vm.runtime.targets,hT=false,hG=false,hR=false,hS=false,hF=false,hI=false;for(var t=0;t<tg.length;t++){var bl=tg[t].blocks._blocks;for(var id in bl){var b=bl[id];if(b.opcode==='sensing_touchingobject'||b.opcode==='sensing_touchingobjectmenu')hT=true;if(b.opcode==='motion_gotoxy')hG=true;if(b.opcode==='operator_random')hR=true;if(b.opcode==='data_changevariableby')hS=true;if(b.opcode==='control_forever')hF=true;if(b.opcode==='control_if'||b.opcode==='control_if_else')hI=true;}}if(hT&&hG&&hR&&hS&&hF&&hI){r.style.color='#86efac';r.textContent='✓ Collision detection and random repositioning working!';__markStepComplete();}else{var miss=[];if(!hT)miss.push('touching sprite?');if(!hG)miss.push('go to x: y:');if(!hR)miss.push('pick random');if(!hS)miss.push('change score');r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Missing: '+miss.join(', ')+'.';};}catch(e){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Cannot check: '+e.message;}};}())

steps.title: Skill 4: Chasing & Score Decrease
steps.content:
Skill 4: Chasing and score decrease

An enemy sprite chases the player. When it catches the player the score goes down and the enemy says something.

Enemy sprite script

when green flag clicked
forever
  point towards [Player v]
  move (2) steps
  if <touching [Player v]?> then
    change [Score v] by (-1)
    say [Got you!] for (2) seconds
  end
end

Build this on an enemy sprite — you need a Player sprite on the stage too:
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,btn=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),isF=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');btn.textContent=isF?'✕':'⛶';btn.title=isF?'Exit full screen (Esc)':'Full screen';if(isF){window._y7sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._y7sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._y7r)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._y7r);window._y7r=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',window._y7r);if(window._y7k)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);window._y7k=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){var frame=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),r=document.getElementById('y7-check-result');try{var vm=frame.contentWindow.vm;if(!vm){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Editor still loading — try again in a moment.';return;}var tg=vm.runtime.targets,hPt=false,hSay=false,hSc=false,hT=false;for(var t=0;t<tg.length;t++){var bl=tg[t].blocks._blocks;for(var id in bl){var b=bl[id];if(b.opcode==='motion_pointtowards')hPt=true;if(b.opcode==='looks_sayforsecs'||b.opcode==='looks_say')hSay=true;if(b.opcode==='data_changevariableby')hSc=true;if(b.opcode==='sensing_touchingobject'||b.opcode==='sensing_touchingobjectmenu')hT=true;}}if(hPt&&hSay&&hSc&&hT){r.style.color='#86efac';r.textContent='✓ Chasing, say, and score decrease all detected!';__markStepComplete();}else{var miss=[];if(!hPt)miss.push('point towards');if(!hSay)miss.push('say block');if(!hSc)miss.push('change score');if(!hT)miss.push('touching?');r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Missing: '+miss.join(', ')+'.';};}catch(e){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Cannot check: '+e.message;}};}())

steps.title: Skill 5: Put It All Together
steps.content:
Skill 5: Put it all together

Build a mini-game using all the skills from this lesson. Use three sprites: a Player, a Collectible, and an Enemy.

What each sprite needs:

  • Player — animates (next costume) + moves with arrow keys
  • Collectible — if touching Player → jump to random position + change score by 1
  • Enemy — forever: point towards Player + move + if touching Player → change score by -1 + say something

Enemy reminder

when green flag clicked
forever
  point towards [Player v]
  move (2) steps
  if <touching [Player v]?> then
    change [Score v] by (-1)
    say [Got you!] for (2) seconds
  end
end

Build all three sprites, then press Check:
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,btn=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),isF=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');btn.textContent=isF?'✕':'⛶';btn.title=isF?'Exit full screen (Esc)':'Full screen';if(isF){window._y7sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._y7sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._y7r)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._y7r);window._y7r=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',window._y7r);if(window._y7k)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);window._y7k=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){var frame=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),r=document.getElementById('y7-check-result');try{var vm=frame.contentWindow.vm;if(!vm){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Editor still loading — try again in a moment.';return;}var tg=vm.runtime.targets;var hKeys=false,hCostume=false,hTouch=false,hRandom=false,hChase=false,hSay=false,hUp=false,hDn=false,hF=false;for(var t=0;t<tg.length;t++){var bl=tg[t].blocks._blocks;for(var id in bl){var b=bl[id];if(b.opcode==='sensing_keypressed'&&b.fields&&b.fields.KEY_OPTION){var k=b.fields.KEY_OPTION[0];if(k==='right arrow'||k==='left arrow'||k==='up arrow'||k==='down arrow')hKeys=true;}if(b.opcode==='looks_nextcostume'||b.opcode==='looks_switchcostumeto')hCostume=true;if(b.opcode==='sensing_touchingobject'||b.opcode==='sensing_touchingobjectmenu')hTouch=true;if(b.opcode==='operator_random')hRandom=true;if(b.opcode==='motion_pointtowards')hChase=true;if(b.opcode==='looks_sayforsecs'||b.opcode==='looks_say')hSay=true;if(b.opcode==='control_forever')hF=true;if(b.opcode==='data_changevariableby'){var inp=b.inputs&&b.inputs.VALUE;if(inp){var vb=tg[t].blocks._blocks[inp[1]];if(vb&&vb.fields&&vb.fields.NUM){var n=parseFloat(vb.fields.NUM[0]);if(n>0)hUp=true;if(n<0)hDn=true;}}}}}var sprCount=tg.filter(function(x){return !x.isStage;}).length;var checks=[hKeys,hCostume,hTouch,hRandom,hChase,hSay,hUp,hDn,hF,sprCount>=3];var labels=['arrow key control','costume animation','collision detection','random position','chase (point towards)','say block','score increase','score decrease','forever loop','3 sprites'];var okCount=checks.filter(Boolean).length;if(okCount===checks.length){r.style.color='#86efac';r.textContent='✓ Mini-game complete — all skills detected! Great revision.';__markStepComplete();}else{var miss=labels.filter(function(_,i){return !checks[i];});r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Missing ('+miss.length+'): '+miss.join(', ')+'.';};}catch(e){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Cannot check: '+e.message;}};}())

steps.title: Knowledge Check
steps.content:
Quick knowledge check

Answer these four questions to finish your revision.
steps.js: createMCQSet('ap2-kc',[{q:'Which block makes a sprite animate by switching between its appearances?',opts:['change x by (10)','move (10) steps','next costume (in a loop)','set size to (100)%'],correct:2,feedback:'Correct — next costume inside a forever loop cycles through costumes to create animation.',wrongFeedback:'Use next costume inside a forever loop to cycle through the sprite costumes.'},{q:'Which combination of blocks makes a sprite chase the player?',opts:['move (10) steps only','go to [player v]','forever → point towards [player v] → move (3) steps','if touching [player v] → move steps'],correct:2,feedback:'Correct — point towards faces the enemy at the player, then move closes the gap.',wrongFeedback:'forever → point towards [player] → move steps is the standard chase pattern.'},{q:'How do you make the score go down by 1?',opts:['set [score v] to (0)','change [score v] by (1)','change [score v] by (-1)','delete score'],correct:2,feedback:'Correct — change by (-1) subtracts 1 from the current score.',wrongFeedback:'change [score v] by (-1) decreases the score. A negative value subtracts.'},{q:'A sprite needs to move in four directions with arrow keys. Which structure is needed?',opts:['Four separate when key pressed scripts','repeat (4) → move steps','forever → four if key pressed blocks each changing x or y','A single move block'],correct:2,feedback:'Correct — a forever loop with four if <key pressed?> blocks is the standard four-directional control.',wrongFeedback:'Use a forever loop containing four if <key pressed?> blocks — one per arrow key.'}]);

quizQuestions.q: Which block makes a sprite animate between two appearances?
How do you decrease the score by 1 in Scratch?
Which script makes a sprite chase another called 'Player'?
options: when flag clicked → forever → point towards [Player v] → move (3) steps
when flag clicked → go to [Player v]
when flag clicked → if touching [Player v] → move (3) steps

quizQuestions.q: Which block makes a sprite say something for exactly 5 seconds?
Build a sprite that moves in all four directions using arrow keys. Click Check & Submit when done.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer: when flag → forever → if right pressed → change x 5 → if left → change x -5 → if up → change y 5 → if down → change y -5

quizQuestions.q: Build a script where a sprite chases another sprite called 'Player' in a forever loop. Click Check & Submit when done.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer: when flag clicked → forever → point towards [Player] → move 3 steps

quizQuestions.q: Build a sprite that detects touching another sprite and, when it does, goes to a random position and increases the score. Click Check & Submit when done.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer: when flag clicked → forever → if touching [Player]? → go to x: (random) y: (random) → change [score] by 1
